ns0:entry.ns0:title: Lissy93/networking-toolbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Lissy93/networking-toolbox
Language: svelte
🛜 100+ offline-first networking tools and utilities

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dbgate/dbgate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dbgate/dbgate
Language: svelte
Database manager for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, SQLite and others. Runs under Windows, Linux, Mac or as web application

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kagisearch/kite-public
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kagisearch/kite-public
Language: svelte
Open source repository for Kite, news app by Kagi.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mathesar-foundation/mathesar
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mathesar-foundation/mathesar
Language: svelte
An intuitive spreadsheet-like interface that lets users of all technical skill levels view, edit, query, and collaborate on Postgres data directly—100% open source and self hosted, with native Postgres access control.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mermaid-js/mermaid-live-editor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid-live-editor
Language: svelte
Edit, preview and share mermaid charts/diagrams. New implementation of the live editor.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openfoodfacts/openfoodfacts-explorer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openfoodfacts/openfoodfacts-explorer
Language: svelte
An alternative frontend for OpenFoodFacts, made with SvelteKit

ns0:entry.ns0:title: outpoot/rugplay
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/outpoot/rugplay
Language: svelte
A fake, multiplayer crypto simulator. Create coins, trade with liquidity pools, bet on prediction questions, gamble it all, and climb the leaderboards!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pluja/whishper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pluja/whishper
Language: svelte
Transcribe any audio to text, translate and edit subtitles 100% locally with a web UI. Powered by whisper models!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rodrigogs/whats-reader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rodrigogs/whats-reader
Language: svelte
Browse WhatsApp chat exports offline with AI-powered voice transcription. Privacy-first desktop/web app with bookmarks, search, and statistics. Built with SvelteKit and Electron.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: saadeghi/daisyui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/saadeghi/daisyui
Language: svelte
🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼  The most popular, free and open-source Tailwind CSS component library

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zonetecde/QuranCaption
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zonetecde/QuranCaption
Language: svelte
Transform Quranic recitations into stunning captioned videos with professional quality subtitles and translations in 40+ languages.
